title: CVA6 Sv39 virtual-address check off-by-one
tagline: An off-by-one in a production RISC-V virtual-memory check.
hook_30s: This is the RISC-V Sv39 spec: virtual-address bits 63 down to 38 must all equal bit 38. This is CVA6's code: it checks bits 63 down to 39. That single off-by-one shipped in a virtual-memory protection check in a production RISC-V core. ChipGPT finds it from the spec in 14 seconds.
category: 25 — spec-to-RTL drift (the #1 root cause of respins)

proof.note: Combinational spec-drift — proven exhaustively by formal (SymbiYosys counterexample) and reproduced by a directed test.

steps.agent: Task: check load_store_unit.sv against the RISC-V Sv39 spec for spec-to-RTL drift.
Reading the Sv39 section. Extracting the canonicality rule.

Structured fact: a valid Sv39 virtual address requires bits [63:38] to all equal bit 38 — i.e. the upper bits are all-ones or all-zeros relative to the sign bit. The reference bit is 38; the checked range starts at bit 38.
Parsing load_store_unit.sv with pyslang. Searching the AST for the address-overflow / canonicality check on vaddr.
Found the reduction-based overflow check driving page_fault_o.

DRIFT. RTL reduces over vaddr[63:39] — (&vaddr[63:39])==1 OR (|vaddr[63:39])==0 — so the range starts at bit 39. The spec requires the range from bit 38. Bit 38 is excluded from the check. A non-canonical address whose bit 38 differs from bits[63:39] is not flagged: virtual-memory protection bypass.
Generating the spec-faithful assertion (range from bit 38) and checking it against the RTL.

artifact.explanation: page_fault must assert iff the upper bits are NOT uniform over [63:38] — the spec range, not [63:39].
artifact.result: FAILS on current RTL (checks [63:39]; counterexample below)

steps.agent: Directed test: a non-canonical address with bit 38 = 1, bits[63:39] = 0. Spec says page-fault; buggy RTL does not fault.
Confirmed: spec-to-RTL drift in the Sv39 canonicality check.

artifact.title: CVA6 Sv39 virtual-address check off-by-one
artifact.root_cause: The overflow reduction spans vaddr[63:39]; the spec requires [63:38]. Bit 38 is excluded from the canonicality check.
